_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill to interpret readiness reporting, its operational relevance and intelligence collection impact.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone tracking, risk registers, budget status, and decision requests.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-006 (LS, cosine: 0.555), LS-K-006 (LS, cosine: 0.529).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.453). Shared vocabulary: [reporting, skill]. DCWF-only terms [collection, impact, intelligence, interpret, operational, readiness] vs WIDAI-only terms [budget, decision, executive, level, milestone, producing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.893, R=0.878). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.9%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill to interpret readiness reporting, its operational relevance and intelligen" and "Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.588 > STS 0.453 (gap +0.135). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [reporting, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [reporting, skill]. DCWF-only: [collection, impact, intelligence, interpret, operational, readiness]. WIDAI-only: [budget, decision, executive, level, milestone, producing].
